base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of leonardo — a character (playable) from 1991 turtles in time. Leonardo — katana slash + throw-foot-soldier-at-screen special + stage-hurl (signature move). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
